name: ship-cycle-devkit
description: A gated, constitution-enforcing development lifecycle: requirements → design → review → test → implement → verify → PR, with risk-based model routing. Framework-agnostic; project specifics come from an overlay config.

projectConfig.title: Project overlay config path
projectConfig.description: Path (relative to project root) to the ship-cycle overlay JSON that supplies repo-specific paths, VCS, and i18n settings.
